prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to Scotland as it mentions the processing of personal data under the Dangerous Dogs (Compensation and Exemption Schemes) Order 1991, which is specifically applicable to Scotland. Additionally, Defra processes applications from individuals in Scotland and Wales on behalf of the respective governments.
